name: Step 8 — Combat with populated spell list
description: Verify that characters with ActorSheets enter combat with real spells. Silas Gravemourn (Wizard 5) should be able to use spells in combat after migration.

steps.message: Silas cautiously descends the stone staircase into the crypt. What does he see?
Suddenly a group of skeletons rises from the sarcophagi and attacks!
